zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Credie於1556年出生時，她的父親William Smythe36歲，母親Lady Isabel Credde36歲。她於1574年與William Marmaduke Cutter在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1607年11月12日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Credie于1556年出生时，她的父亲William Smythe36岁，母亲Lady Isabel Credde36岁。她于1574年与William Marmaduke Cutter在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1607年11月12日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Credie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Monique.
Altered form of Welsh or English   Cradick  . Compare   Cradit  .

French (Crédit): from crédit ‘credit, loan’, perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a banker or a nickname for someone, perhaps a shopkeeper, who was well known for using this arrangement. It is very rare in France.

variants.name: Cradick
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Craddock  . Compare   Cradit  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Credie was born in 1556, her father, William Smythe, was 36 and her mother, Lady Isabel Credde, was 36. She married William Marmaduke Cutter in 1574, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 12 November 1607, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Credie est née en 1556, son père, William Smythe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Credde, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé William Marmaduke Cutter en 1574, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 novembre 1607, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear distr: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Credie(이)가 1556년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Smythe(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel Credde(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 William Marmaduke Cutter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Credie родилась в 1556 г., её отцу по имени William Smythe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Credde, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Marmaduke Cutter в 1574 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 ноября 1607 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.
